scripts.build: bun run build:styles && export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$(dirname "$(rustup which cargo)"):$PATH" && cargo build --workspace
scripts.dev: bun run build:styles && export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$(dirname "$(rustup which cargo)"):$PATH" && cargo run -p app-desktop
scripts.bundle:desktop: export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$(dirname "$(rustup which cargo)"):$PATH" && dx bundle --package app-desktop
scripts.test: export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$(dirname "$(rustup which cargo)"):$PATH" && cargo test --workspace
scripts.format: export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$(dirname "$(rustup which cargo)"):$PATH" && cargo fmt --all && bunx biome format --write docs package.json README.md scripts
